title: verbena bipinnatifida var. gooddingii
intro: Verbena bipinnatifida var. gooddingii, also known as Goodding's verbena, is a perennial herb belonging to the verbena family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties. Goodding's verbena has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat conditions like fever, colds, and respiratory issues.
